args.code:
# Get the full list of Indianapolis businesses
business_result = var_functions.query_db:5
# The result appears to be a list of dictionaries
bus_ids = [b['business_id'] for b in business_result]
# Transform to review table format (businessid_ -> businessref_)
review_ids = [bid.replace('businessid_', 'businessref_') for bid in bus_ids]
print('__RESULT__:')
print(str(review_ids))

var_functions.query_db:2.name: Architectural Antiques of Indianapolis
var_functions.query_db:2.description: Located at 5000 W 96th St in Indianapolis, IN, this establishment offers a diverse selection of Antiques, Shopping, Home Services, and Lighting Fixtures & Equipment for all your home and decorative needs.

var_functions.query_db:2.name: Gamestop
var_functions.query_db:2.description: Located at 5816 Crawfordsville Rd in Indianapolis, IN, this store offers a diverse selection of products in categories such as Books, Mags, Music & Video, Video Game Stores, Videos & Video Game Rental, Electronics, Shopping, and Hobby Shops.

var_functions.query_db:2.name: Big Lots
var_functions.query_db:2.description: Located at 8401 Michigan Rd in Indianapolis, IN, this shopping destination offers a diverse range of products across various categories, including Fashion, Department Stores, Furniture Stores, Shopping, Home Decor, Home & Garden, and Discount Store.

var_functions.query_db:2.name: Jordans Fish and Chicken
var_functions.query_db:2.description: Located at 6416 W Washington St in Indianapolis, IN, this establishment offers a delightful menu featuring Restaurants, Chicken Wings, Fish & Chips, and American (Traditional) cuisine.

var_functions.query_db:2.name: Pat Flynn's Public House
var_functions.query_db:2.description: Located at 5198 Allisonville Rd in Indianapolis, IN, this venue offers a vibrant atmosphere perfect for enjoying Irish, Bars, Restaurants, Pubs, Nightlife.

var_functions.query_db:2.name: Taste of Europe
var_functions.query_db:2.description: Located at 4320 W 96th St in Indianapolis, IN, this inviting establishment offers a diverse menu that showcases a delightful fusion of flavors across categories such as Food, Specialty Food, Ethnic Food, Modern European, Restaurants.

var_functions.query_db:2.name: Long John Silver's
var_functions.query_db:2.description: Located at 2831 E 38th St in Indianapolis, IN, this establishment offers a diverse menu featuring Fast Food, Seafood, Restaurants, catering to a variety of tastes and preferences.

var_functions.query_db:2.name: Fox and Hound English Pub and Grille
var_functions.query_db:2.description: Located at 4901 E 82nd St, Ste 900 in Indianapolis, IN, this vibrant establishment offers a fantastic experience for those seeking American (New), Nightlife, Bars, Restaurants, Pubs.

args.query: SELECT business_ref, rating FROM review WHERE business_ref IN ('businessref_52', 'businessref_84', 'businessref_76', 'businessref_87', 'businessref_65');

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, rating FROM review WHERE business_ref IN ('businessref_52', 'businessref_84', 'businessref_76', 'businessref_87', 'businessref_65');

args.code:
# Access the ratings data
ratings_data = locals()['var_functions.query_db:12']

# Extract all ratings and convert to integers
ratings = [int(item['rating']) for item in ratings_data]

# Calculate the average rating
import json
avg_rating = sum(ratings) / len(ratings) if ratings else 0

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({"count": len(ratings), "average": round(avg_rating, 2)}))

# Access the ratings data
ratings_data = locals()['var_functions.query_db:12']

# Extract all ratings and convert to integers
ratings = [int(item['rating']) for item in ratings_data]

# Calculate the average rating
import json
avg_rating = sum(ratings) / len(ratings) if ratings else 0

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({"count": len(ratings), "average": round(avg_rating, 2)}))
